page: Microsoft Azure M416-208ms_v2 is an x86_64 architecture server belonging to the MSv2 family, designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads. It is powered by dedicated Intel Xeon 8280L processors operating at 2.7 GHz, featuring 104 physical cores and 208 vCPUs with hyper-threading enabled. The system is equipped with an exceptionally large memory capacity of 11,400.0 GB, providing approximately 54.81 GB of RAM per core. Additionally, it includes 8,389 GB of local storage and is premium storage capable, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

In benchmark evaluations, the server demonstrates top-tier multi-core and memory performance. The stress-ng multi-core CPU test, PassMark CPU score, and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression all rank in the top 10% of tested systems. Memory bandwidth is a key strength, with cached small-block read speeds reaching 10,444.18 GB/sec and uncached large-block write speeds at 305.41 GB/sec, both placing in the top tier. Redis SET operations also perform exceptionally well, achieving 159.37 million operations per second. However, single-core performance is a notable tradeoff, with stress-ng single-core and single-threaded compression benchmarks ranking in the bottom 25%.

Given its massive memory footprint and high multi-threaded throughput, this server offers high resource density for enterprise-scale deployments. It is highly optimized for memory-bound applications rather than single-threaded compute speed. The hardware profile is best suited for large-scale in-memory databases, massive data warehousing, enterprise resource planning systems, and heavy multi-threaded data processing pipelines.
description: Microsoft Azure M416-208ms_v2 is a memory-optimized server in the MSv2 family, powered by an Intel Xeon 8280L processor with 104 physical cores and 208 vCPUs. It features 11,400.0 GB of RAM and 8,389 GB of local storage, running on Microsoft Hyper-V. The server delivers top-tier multi-core performance and memory bandwidth, with uncached large-block read speeds of 581.2 GB/sec and Redis SET performance reaching 159.37 million operations per second. However, single-core performance is relatively weak, ranking in the bottom 25%. This high-density hardware profile is qualitatively cost-efficient for massive scale-up workloads, making it ideal for large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise ERP systems, and heavy multi-threaded data processing.
og_description: Microsoft Azure M416-208ms_v2 is a memory-intensive server featuring 208 vCPUs, 11,400 GB of RAM, and 8,389 GB of local storage, delivering top-tier multi-core and memory bandwidth performance.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure M416-208ms_v2 is a memory-intensive server with 208 vCPUs, 11.4 TB RAM, and 8,389 GB local storage, optimized for enterprise databases.
tagline: An ultra-high-capacity memory-optimized platform featuring eleven terabytes of RAM and massive multi-threaded throughput for enterprise database workloads.
bullet_points: Equipped with 11,400 GB of RAM and 208 vCPUs on Intel Xeon 8280L processors
Includes 8,389 GB of local storage with premium storage capabilities
Delivers top-tier memory bandwidth and multi-core processing performance
Achieves 159.37 million operations per second in Redis SET benchmarks
Tradeoff of weaker single-core performance, ranking in the bottom 25%
Optimized for large-scale in-memory databases and enterprise ERP systems
